title: HalbCore
description:
A Library vor Halbzwilling's Datapacks! 
Multiplayer, Projectiles & Click Detection!
body:
# HalbCore
This Datapack is a library pack that helps creating multiplayer-friendly datapacks that add clickable items which can shoot projectiles. It also helps with creating and executing functions with individual player storages and gives a unique ID to each player on the server so they can own things.
